texto: Sometimes I think of my life as a sitcom. But in reality, life is more than a series of memorable events that bring out the Meg Ryan in us. Life happens in the gaps between scenes. We live in the fade-to-blacks.
explicacao: Citação de Dorothy Angle sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes I think of my life as a sitcom. But in reality, life is more than a series of memorable…” articula reflexao, vida, reality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reality.
